sections.paragraph:
Original: ירד

Transliteration: yered

Phonetic: yeh'-red

BDB Definition:

Jered or Jared = "descent"
  1. son of Mahalaleel and father of Enoch in the 4th generation from Seth
  2. a descendant of Judah and father of Gedor

Origin: from H3381

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
